raw.subject: Something I noticed about Rustic Scruff
raw.body:
Hi,

I saw your post about being awarded 'Best' in Pet Services Grundy County 2026 - that's quite an achievement! Congratulations.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be costing you some bookings and calls that could turn into loyal customers. Local pet owners are often searching online for pet services and a website is a great way to showcase your services and location.

On a whim I pulled together a quick page concept from what you already post on Facebook. It includes a section for your grooming services and a photo gallery from some of your recent work, as well as a call-to-action for people to book their grooming appointments.

https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/rustic-scruff-coal-city/

If you're interested in exploring how to get a simple website set up for Rustic Scruff, I'd be happy to discuss the details with you and answer any questions you may have. A straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses.
